name: aims-mcp
description: AIMS MCP Server - LLM access to insurance agent data

scripts.test: cross-env MCP_URL=http://localhost:3011 AIMS_API_URL=http://localhost:3010 RAG_API_URL=http://localhost:8000 vitest run --exclude='**/user-simulation.e2e.test.ts' --exclude='**/__tests__/cross-system/**'
scripts.test:e2e:cross-system: cross-env MCP_URL=http://localhost:3011 AIMS_API_URL=http://localhost:3010 vitest run src/__tests__/cross-system/
scripts.test:e2e:all: cross-env MCP_URL=http://localhost:3011 vitest run src/user-simulation.e2e.test.ts src/__tests__/cross-system/
scripts.test:all: cross-env MCP_URL=http://localhost:3011 AIMS_API_URL=http://localhost:3010 RAG_API_URL=http://localhost:8000 vitest run
